title: Justin Bieber Is Back With SWAG: Album Overview
text: Justin Bieber returns with his seventh album SWAG, nominated for Album of the Year at the 2026 Grammy Awards. The radiant SWAG shows that Bieber is still in his pop prime, gliding between genre touchstones without losing footing. The 20-track album is equal parts confidence and confession, featuring collaborations with artists like Gunna and Sexyy Red alongside production assists from Dijon, Daniel Caesar, Mk.gee, and longtime collaborator Eddie Benjamin. Justin Bieber is nominated for four Grammy Awards: Album Of The Year for SWAG, Best Pop Solo Performance for DAISIES, Best Pop Vocal Album for SWAG, and Best R&B Performance for YUKON. The album marks Bieber's return to the Grammys stage after a four-year absence, making it his first performance at the ceremony since 2022. SWAG competes with seven other albums in the Album of the Year category, all from first-time nominees in this prestigious category. Bad Bunny ultimately won the award, but Bieber's participation marked a significant moment for his career resurgence and return to Grammy prominence.
